metric_definitions.name: CPU Utilization (%)
metric_definitions.description: Average CPU utilization percentage across all nodes in a cluster.

metric_definitions.name: Workload CPU Utilization (%)
metric_definitions.description: Average CPU utilization percentage for a Kubernetes workload or service.

metric_definitions.name: VM CPU Utilization (%)
metric_definitions.description: Average CPU utilization percentage for an individual virtual machine instance.

metric_definitions.name: Error Rate (%)
metric_definitions.description: Percentage of requests that result in error responses for a service.

metric_definitions.name: Request Latency (ms)
metric_definitions.description: Average end-to-end request latency in milliseconds for a service.

metric_definitions.name: Storage Used (GB)
metric_definitions.description: Total logical storage space used by objects in a bucket, measured in gigabytes.

notification_channels.name: On-Call
notification_channels.description: Primary on-call rotation for high-severity production alerts.

notification_channels.name: Slack - #infra-alerts
notification_channels.description: Slack channel for infrastructure alerts and notifications.

notification_channels.name: Email - Ops Team
notification_channels.description: Email distribution list for non-critical operational notifications.

notification_channels.name: Internal Webhook
notification_channels.description: Generic webhook endpoint used for integrating alerts with internal systems.

permissions.name: analytics_read_projects
permissions.description: View analytics projects and their high-level metadata.

permissions.name: analytics_read_datasets
permissions.description: View analytics datasets and query results.

permissions.name: analytics_create_dashboards
permissions.description: Create new analytics dashboards within a project.

permissions.name: compute_read_instances
permissions.description: List and view details of virtual machine instances.

permissions.name: compute_manage_instances
permissions.description: Create, start, stop, and delete virtual machine instances.

permissions.name: kubernetes_read_workloads
permissions.description: View Kubernetes workloads, pods, and their status.

permissions.name: kubernetes_manage_autoscaling
permissions.description: Configure and manage Kubernetes autoscaling policies.

permissions.name: database_read_clusters
permissions.description: View database clusters, nodes, and configuration details.

permissions.name: database_manage_maintenance
permissions.description: Schedule and manage maintenance windows for database clusters.

permissions.name: storage_read_buckets
permissions.description: List storage buckets and view their properties.

permissions.name: storage_manage_backups
permissions.description: Create and modify backup policies for storage buckets.

permissions.name: monitoring_manage_alerts
permissions.description: Create, update, and delete alert rules and notification settings.

permissions.name: cost_management_read_reports
permissions.description: View cost analytics, breakdowns, and reports.

permissions.name: administration_manage_access_control
permissions.description: Manage users, roles, and permission assignments.

permissions.name: project_read
permissions.description: View project metadata, membership, and settings.

permissions.name: project_manage_members
permissions.description: Add or remove users from projects and modify their roles.

vm_sizes.name: Standard-1vCPU-2GB
vm_sizes.description: Entry-level general purpose instance suitable for low-traffic services and development workloads.

vm_sizes.name: Standard-2vCPU-8GB
vm_sizes.description: Balanced compute and memory instance for small production services.

vm_sizes.name: Standard-4vCPU-16GB
vm_sizes.description: Standard instance type recommended for most production application servers.

vm_sizes.name: Standard-8vCPU-32GB
vm_sizes.description: Larger general purpose instance for high-traffic services and APIs.

vm_sizes.name: HighMem-4vCPU-32GB
vm_sizes.description: High memory instance optimized for in-memory caches and analytics workloads.

vm_sizes.name: HighCPU-8vCPU-16GB
vm_sizes.description: Compute-optimized instance ideal for CPU-bound workloads and batch processing.

vm_sizes.name: GPU-8vCPU-64GB-1xV100
vm_sizes.description: GPU-accelerated instance with one NVIDIA V100 GPU for ML and GPU workloads.

vm_sizes.name: Burstable-2vCPU-4GB
vm_sizes.description: Cost-effective burstable instance for low to medium baseline CPU usage.

vm_sizes.name: Burstable-4vCPU-8GB
vm_sizes.description: Burstable instance with additional CPU capacity for variable workloads.

projects.description: Shared infrastructure components such as monitoring, logging, and CI/CD tooling.

clusters.name: marketing-web-cluster
clusters.description: Cluster hosting marketing websites, landing pages, and tracking services.

dashboards.name: Kubernetes Workloads - Production
dashboards.description: CPU, memory, and pod status for production Kubernetes workloads.

dashboards.description: Release status, canary metrics, and error rates for billing-api.

dashboards.name: Marketing Campaign Performance

dashboards.name: Marketing Cost & Traffic
dashboards.description: Blended view of marketing costs and traffic volumes by channel.

dashboards.name: Analytics Pipeline Health
dashboards.description: ETL job status, data freshness, and pipeline latency.

dashboards.name: Analytics Query Performance
dashboards.description: Warehouse CPU, query latency, and concurrency metrics.

dashboards.name: Database Operations - Production
dashboards.description: Health, replication lag, and maintenance status for production databases.

dashboards.name: Storage & Backups Overview
dashboards.description: Bucket usage, backup success rates, and retention coverage.

dashboards.name: Cost Overview - All Projects
dashboards.description: Cross-project monthly cost trends and budget burn-down.

dashboards.name: Infrastructure Status
dashboards.description: Global view of cluster health, capacity, and incident status.

dashboards.name: Security & Compliance
dashboards.description: Security alerts, patch compliance, and audit findings.

dashboards.name: On-Call Runbook Shortcuts
dashboards.description: Key health indicators and links for on-call responders.

dashboards.name: Customer Experience Overview
dashboards.description: Frontend performance, error rates, and availability from user perspective.

dashboards.name: Staging Environment Overview
dashboards.description: Health and deployment status for staging clusters and services.

roles.name: ReadOnly-Analytics
roles.description: Read-only access to Analytics project resources

roles.name: Analytics-Admin
roles.description: Full administrative access to analytics resources within the Analytics project.

roles.name: Global-Admin
roles.description: Unrestricted administrative access across all projects and resources.

roles.name: DevOps-Engineer
roles.description: Manage compute, Kubernetes, storage, databases, and monitoring across environments.

roles.name: ReadOnly-Production
roles.description: Read-only access to all production resources.

roles.name: Project-Owner-Production
roles.description: Owner role for the Production project with broad management permissions.

roles.name: Cost-Viewer-Marketing
roles.description: View-only access to Marketing project costs and basic project metadata.

roles.name: Access-Control-Admin
roles.description: Manage roles, permissions, and project membership.

roles.name: Monitoring-Viewer
roles.description: View dashboards and cost reports for operational awareness.

roles.name: Storage-Backup-Admin
roles.description: Manage storage buckets and backup policies across projects.

roles.name: Database-Admin
roles.description: Administer managed database clusters and maintenance windows.

roles.name: Kubernetes-Admin
roles.description: Manage Kubernetes workloads, autoscaling, and associated compute instances.

roles.name: Project-Admin-Marketing
roles.description: Administer project membership and cost visibility for the Marketing project.

roles.name: ReadOnly-Shared-Services
roles.description: Read-only access to shared services infrastructure and monitoring.

services.name: billing-api

services.name: payments-api
services.description: Processes payment authorization, capture, and refunds.

services.name: api-gateway
services.description: Edge API gateway routing external traffic to backend services.

services.name: web-frontend
services.description: Customer-facing web frontend serving the main application UI.

services.name: orders-api
services.description: Manages order lifecycle, cart checkout, and fulfillment orchestration.

services.name: orders-db-service
services.description: Logical representation of the orders database cluster for monitoring and cost attribution.

services.name: ad-tracker
services.description: Collects and processes ad impression and click events.

services.name: campaign-manager
services.description: UI for configuring and monitoring marketing campaigns.

services.name: landing-pages
services.description: Serves dynamic landing pages for marketing campaigns.

services.name: email-service
services.description: Background worker for sending and tracking marketing emails.

services.name: etl-processor
services.description: Nightly ETL pipeline that loads and aggregates analytics datasets.

services.name: reporting-ui
services.description: Web interface for analytics dashboards and ad-hoc queries.

services.name: segmentation-service
services.description: Generates customer segments for targeting and personalization.

services.name: monitoring-platform
services.description: Centralized monitoring stack aggregating metrics and logs.

services.name: log-aggregation
services.description: Aggregates and indexes logs from all clusters and services.
